query:
UPDATE batches
                SET finalizing_at = COALESCE(finalizing_at, $2),
                    completed_at = COALESCE(completed_at, $3),
                    failed_at = COALESCE(failed_at, $4),
                    completed_requests = $5,
                    failed_requests = $6,
                    canceled_requests = $7,
                    counts_frozen_at = COALESCE(counts_frozen_at, $2)
                WHERE id = $1
